text:
Once upon a time, there was a little-known cave nestled deep in a whispering forest. It was rumored that within those underground walls, a mystical creature roamed called the Lumina. People avoided the cave because they feared being swallowed by darkness and forgotten.

One brave explorer named Luna stumbled upon its entrance one dewy morning. Her heart raced at the notion of meeting the Lumina. She pushed open the calcified door and stepped into a dimness so profound that birds fell silent. As her eyes adapted, she saw sparkling eyes peering back.

"Luna!" cooed an unearthly voice. From the gloom stepped a figure as luminous as dawn stars. It was covered in shimmering silken hair, each strand glowing faintly. Luna was struck by a sudden urge to share her joy—the Lumina had made eye contact!

"Hello! I'm Luna!" She smiled wildly. The Lumina blushed a soft purply hue and replied:

"Greetings, Luna.
